scripts.check:local-quality: npm run lint && npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit --pretty false && npm run build && npm run check:release-local
scripts.check:source-contracts: npm run check:local-links && npm run check:launch-claims && npm run check:client-copy && npm run check:waitlist-handoff && npm run check:product-design-contract
scripts.check:source-contracts:report: npm run check:local-links:report && npm run check:launch-claims:report && npm run check:client-copy && npm run check:waitlist-handoff && npm run check:product-design-contract
scripts.check:release-local: npm run check:dependency-audit && npm run check:source-contracts
scripts.check:release-local:report: npm run check:dependency-audit && npm run check:source-contracts:report
